# NVO987 Research Infrastructure

This site is part of the NVO987 decentralized research infrastructure.

Domain
https://nvo987.us

Identity node
https://identity.nvo987.us

Machine-readable metadata
https://nvo987.us/metadata/infrastructure.jsonld

API description
https://nvo987.us/api/openapi.json

Documentation
https://nvo987.us/docs/

Purpose
Decentralized research infrastructure for identity, knowledge graph publication, and machine-readable research artifacts.
